goals: Explore the project structure to understand the codebase layout
Find relevant source files related to discussion groups or community features
Search for specific functionality or patterns in the code related to community support

user_agent_config.personality: Enthusiastic and exploratory, approaches new topics with an open mind. Prefers to understand the big picture before diving into details.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Not a developer or technical user. Familiar with community support concepts from their self-help work but has no experience with codebases or development tools. Does not know tool names or internal APIs.

end_condition: The user has successfully explored the project structure, identified relevant files related to discussion groups or community features, and found specific code patterns related to community support functionality.
